name: ESET Inspect
description: Integrates with ESET Inspect REST API for endpoint detection and response, detection management, computer isolation, and rule configuration

actions.name: List Detections
actions.description: Retrieve a list of detections with pagination and filtering

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of detections to return

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Number of records to skip for pagination

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression (e.g., severityScore ge 80)

parameters.name: $orderby
parameters.description: Sort order (e.g., creationTime desc)

actions.name: Get Detection Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific detection

parameters.name: detection_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the detection

actions.name: Update Detection
actions.description: Update the status or note of a detection (resolve, mark as false positive, etc.)

parameters.name: detection_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the detection

parameters.name: resolved
parameters.description: Set to true to mark the detection as resolved

parameters.name: note
parameters.description: Analyst note to add to the detection

actions.name: List Computers
actions.description: Retrieve a list of computers (endpoints) managed by ESET Inspect

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of computers to return

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Number of records to skip for pagination

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression

actions.name: Isolate Computer
actions.description: Isolate a computer from the network to contain a potential threat

parameters.name: machine_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the computer to isolate

actions.name: Release Computer from Isolation
actions.description: Remove network isolation from a computer

parameters.name: machine_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the computer to unisolate

actions.name: List Executables
actions.description: Retrieve a list of executables observed across managed endpoints

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of executables to return

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Number of records to skip

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression (e.g., sha256 eq '...')

actions.name: Block Executable
actions.description: Add an executable to the blocked hashes list to prevent future execution

parameters.name: sha256
parameters.description: SHA256 hash of the executable to block

parameters.name: note
parameters.description: Note describing why the executable was blocked

actions.name: List Rules
actions.description: Retrieve the list of detection rules configured in ESET Inspect

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of rules to return

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Number of records to skip

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression

actions.name: Kill Process
actions.description: Terminate a running process on a managed computer

parameters.name: machine_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the computer

parameters.name: processId
parameters.description: The process ID (PID) to terminate
